Mode: hybrid

For VS Code Copilot, prefer dynamic context over static snapshots.

- `ai-memory context`

Rules:
- Runtime commands are the source of truth.
- Treat static instruction text as routing hints only.

- Goal: lightweight developer-memory layer for AI coding workflows

Quick project glance (lightweight index):
- agentd: agent runtime manager
- ai-balance: Monitors balance for multiple AI service providers with CLI checks and FastAPI visualization.
- ai-memory: Developer memory layer CLI for persistent context across projects and AI tools.
- ai-shovel-index: Generates daily A-share index signal cards and post text for automated publishing. (https://github.com/shiyuanyou/AI-Shovel-Index.git)
- anti-fomo: Investment analysis system evolving from CLI into a FastAPI + Vue full-stack app. (https://github.com/shiyuanyou/anti-fomo.git)
- mind-flow: Full-stack AI mind-mapping tool with Vue canvas interactions and FastAPI backend.
- personal-finance-audit: Personal portfolio audit and execution system for long-term asset allocation.
